event: Blizzard alert! If you have blow or ket on you, take a big bump. You piece of shit. Fuck you.
The color of silverware in China is changing rapidly. Everyone wearing black or white shoes take a big sip you basic fuck.
Suicide bomber! The first one to finish their drink gets to make two other people do the same.
Stink bomb! Anyone who hasn't showered today, choose one person to take a pull.
Earthquake! Last person to get both feet off the ground takes a shot.
Pandemic! Everyone drinks. No exceptions. This is communism.
Alien invasion! Last person to put their phone on their head takes a shot.
Natural disaster! Everyone passes their drink to the left. That's yours now. Deal with it.
Tax audit! The player in first place buys the player in last place a drink. Or a shot. Dealer's choice.
Draft notice! Everyone born in an odd-numbered month drinks. Your parents' timing did this to you.
Solar eclipse! Everyone close your eyes. Host counts to 5. First person caught peeking takes a shot.
Blackout! Everyone closes their eyes for 10 seconds. First person to open them drinks. Honor system. We know you'll cheat.
Famine! No one may drink for the next 60 seconds. Anyone caught sipping takes a shot.
Mercury is in retrograde. If you're a Scorpio, Gemini, or Leo you owe everyone 1 sip. If you don't know your sign, 2 sips for being uncultured.
Propaganda broadcast! The host tells a lie about themselves. Anyone who calls bullshit correctly — host drinks double. Nobody catches it — everyone else drinks.
A flock of geese has breached the perimeter. The shortest person in the room drinks. This is not negotiable.
Border dispute! The two players sitting closest together must rock-paper-scissors. Loser drinks.
Peace treaty! Everyone clinks drinks and takes a sip together. Wholesome moment.
Flash flood! Everyone holding their drink takes a sip. Everyone NOT holding their drink takes a shot for being unprepared.
Whistleblower! Everyone unlocks their phone and shows their last Google search. Group votes on the most concerning one. That person drinks.
